title: bbe-comm Learning Event
description: One entry in the append-only learning-events.jsonl. NEVER contains raw block bodies, raw operator prompts, @hmac values, @nonce values, or any auth-only field value. Content reduced to SHA-256 hashes plus structured metadata. Suggestions synthesized from these events are review-only — never silently applied.

block_label_shape.description: Length-bucketed label shape, NOT the label itself. e.g. 'short|D' = ≤16 chars, contains dash.

correlation_hash.description: SHA-256[:12] of @correlation_id, prefixed with 'corr#'. NEVER the raw correlation_id.

file_hash.description: SHA-256[:12] of file path. NEVER the raw path.

summary.description: Short, redacted human description. NEVER contains block bodies.

extra.description: Structured metadata. Forbidden field names (hmac, nonce, scope, target, issued_by, not_after, revokes, x-bbe-sig, x-bbe-ledger, x-bbe-attest) are scrubbed to '<REDACTED>' on write.
